[textmode.js](../../../index.md) / [Textmodifier](../../Textmodifier.md) / noLoop

# Method: noLoop()

```ts
noLoop(): void;
```

Stop the automatic rendering loop.

Rendering can be resumed later with [loop](loop.md).

## Returns

`void`
